faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Orange typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Orange residents before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Orange?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Orange are completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatment or require 2-3 follow-up visits over several weeks for chemical treatments. Our team will assess your specific situation during the inspection and provide an accurate timeline for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Orange?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. We provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure the safety of everyone in your Orange home.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Orange, with free follow-up visits if bed bugs return within the guarantee period. Our goal is complete elimination, and we stand behind our work with one of the best guarantees in the industry.
